name: Garlicky Hummus (Makes 1-3/4 Cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, combine chick-peas, tahini, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, and salt. Puree until smooth. If made in advance, transfer to a bowl, cover, and refrigerate.
2. Before serving, top with chopped parsley and a dusting of paprika. Serve with pita bread.
